hero.title: MIRYA Security Policy
hero.description: Your data security is our highest priority. This page outlines the safeguards, systems, and practices MIRYA uses to protect your information at every stage of the automation lifecycle.

summary.title: Summary of key Points
summary.intro: This summary provides key points from our Privacy Notice, but you can find out more details about any of these topics by using our
summary.introSuffix: below to find the section you are looking for.
paragraphs: MIRYA collects only the information needed to operate and improve the platform—such as your account details, usage activity, and the documents or data you choose to process through workflows. Your data stays yours: MIRYA uses it only to run automations, enhance performance, and provide support. We never sell your information and only share it with trusted service providers or apps you choose to integrate with. We protect your data using encryption, access controls, and secure infrastructure. You can request access, correction, or deletion of your information at any time. MIRYA uses cookies to improve your experience, and the service is not intended for children under 16.

By using MIRYA, you agree to follow our rules, keep your account secure, and use the platform responsibly. You retain ownership of all data, documents, and workflows you upload, and MIRYA processes them only to deliver automation functionality. While we strive for high reliability, continuous service is not guaranteed, and features may change over time.

Using MIRYA responsibly means avoiding illegal, harmful, or abusive automation behaviors. We are not liable for indirect losses, misuse, or issues arising from third-party integrations. Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled, and refunds are limited to legal requirements.

soc.title: SOC 2 & SOC 3 Reports
list: SOC 2 reports are available to enterprise customers under NDA.
SOC 3 summary reports may be available publicly for general review.
These reports outline our security program, internal controls, and independent auditor assessments.

gdpr.title: GDPR & Data Protection
gdpr.desc: MIRYA complies with the GDPR (EU General Data Protection Regulation). We provide:

auth.title: User Accounts, Authentication & Authorization
cloudList: Passwords are hashed and salted before storage.
Authentication credentials are stored in encrypted databases.
OAuth and secure credential storage is used wherever possible.
selfHostedList: Password hashing follows MIRYA's recommended security configuration.
Encryption at-rest, network encryption, and secret management must be configured by the customer.
Custom session timeouts and advanced password policies are supported.

integrations.title: Third-Party Accounts & Integrations
integrations.desc: Automation often requires connecting to external systems (ERP, CRM, HR, email, etc.).
list: MIRYA uses OAuth whenever supported to provide secure, scoped access.
If OAuth is unavailable, API keys or tokens are stored securely and encrypted at rest.
MIRYA isolates tokens inside the execution environment on a per-workspace basis.
MIRYA does not log credential values unless explicitly enabled by the customer.

cloudHosting.title: 3. Cloud Hosting & Storage
cloudHosting.desc: MIRYA Cloud uses Microsoft Azure or equivalent enterprise-grade cloud providers with strong physical and network security.

dataCenter.title: Data Center Security
list: Servers run in private, isolated networks.
Physical access is controlled by the cloud provider.
All storage volumes are encrypted by default (AES-256).

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Access Controls
list: MFA enforced for MIRYA engineering access
No direct public access to internal services
Services run inside private sub-nets with firewall rules

database.title: Database & Credential Storage
list: All customer data, workflow data, and credentials are encrypted at rest.
Backups are encrypted and stored in separate availability zones.

inTransit.title: In Transit
list: All data transmitted between your device, MIRYA's cloud services, and public APIs is encrypted using industry-standard TLS/SSL.

atRest.title: At Rest
list: MIRYA encrypts all customer data, databases, workflow inputs/outputs, and credential stores at rest.
AES-256 encryption is applied to all disks and backups.
Encryption keys are managed by the cloud provider using compliant KMS systems.

selfHosted.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
list: Set up TLS for all traffic
Configure KMS and firewall rules via the hosting provider

network.title: 5. Network Security
network.desc: MIRYA Cloud infrastructure is continuously monitored using automated audits and alert systems.
controls: Continuous log monitoring and anomaly alerts

codeManagement.title: Code Management
list: Source code stored in private repositories (Github or similar)
Access granted on a least-privilege basis

codeReview.title: Code Reviews & Testing
list: Every code change is reviewed by a second engineer

environment.title: Environment Separation
list: Development, staging, and production environments are isolated
Only authorized personnel can deploy to production

workstation.title: Workstation Security
workstation.desc: All employee devices follow strict policies:

vulnerability.title: Vulnerability Scanning
vulnerability.desc: Regular automated scans are performed on cloud infrastructure and application code.

penetration.title: Penetration Testing
penetration.desc: Independent penetration tests are conducted annually or after major releases.

intrusion.title: Intrusion Detection
intrusion.desc: MIRYA monitors for signs of intrusions and responds immediately to suspicious activity.

intelligence.title: Threat Intelligence
intelligence.desc: We use trusted intelligence feeds and security tools to stay updated on new threats.

dataBackups.title: Data Backups
list: Customer data is backed up daily.
Backups stored in separate availability zones
Encrypted using the same standards as production data

disaster.title: Disaster Recovery
disaster.desc: MIRYA maintains a detailed DR plan covering:

business.title: Business Continuity
business.desc: Regular tests ensure MIRYA can recover quickly from:
